返回本批次

终端日志文件查看器

Log File Viewer for the Terminal

lnav.org 作者 wiradikusuma 分数 56 评论 7 2026/03/24 13:32
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 终端的日志文件查看器
  2. 轻松合并、尾随、搜索、过滤和查询日志文件。
  3. 没有服务器。无需设置。还是很有特色的。
  4. 便于使用
  5. 只需将 lnav 指向一个目录，它就会处理剩下的事情。自动检测文件格式并即时解压缩压缩文件。在线帮助和操作预览让您更轻松地提升体验。

Original Summary

  1. A log file viewer for the terminal
  2. Merge, tail, search, filter, and query log files with ease.
  3. No server. No setup. Still featureful.
  4. Easy to Use
  5. Just point lnav at a directory and it will take care of the rest. File formats are automatically detected and compressed files are unpacked on the fly. Online help and previews for operations make it simpler to level up your experience.

I was looking for something like this, Appreciate it!

guessmyname 2026/03/24 14:30
噢耶！ lnav很有名。我记得十年前在 GoDaddy 时使用它来监控一系列网络服务器；美好的时光。

第一次提交是从 2009 年 9 月 13 日开始： https://github.com/tstack/lnav/commit/b4ec432515e95e86ec9d71... 。哇哦！我们老了。

这就是当时的用户体验： https://github.com/tstack/lnav/commit/bce2caa654160518ec11f6...

Oh yeah! lnav is famous. I remember using it like a decade ago to monitor an array of web servers while at GoDaddy; good ol' times.

First commit is from Sep 13, 2009: https://github.com/tstack/lnav/commit/b4ec432515e95e86ec9d71... . Woah! we’re old.

This is what the UX looked like back in the day: https://github.com/tstack/lnav/commit/bce2caa654160518ec11f6...

dima55 2026/03/24 14:34
我一直使用 vnlog 和 feedgnuplot 在控制台上处理和绘制数据。它甚至比 tui 还要少，但可能正是您想要的。
I use vnlog and feedgnuplot to massage and plot data on the console all the time. It's even less than a tui, but might be what you want.
在 HN 中查看
dloss 2026/03/24 15:23
如果您对 CLI 很满意，也许我的 Kelora 项目值得一看。它是一个非常灵活的日志处理器，具有内置脚本： https://kelora.dev
If you're fine with CLIs, maybe my Kelora project is worth a look. It's a very flexible log processor with built-in scripting: https://kelora.dev
